summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Dams Car Rental iteration 2. All 30 backend API tests passed (100%). All new features tested and working: logout fix on web, locations management (8 seeded locations across 4 cities), admin locations CRUD, city filters, map directions integration, and full booking flow. No critical issues found.
seed_data_creation: 8 locations seeded across 4 cities (Punta Cana, Santo Domingo, Miami, New York). Test location created and deleted during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 features all working. New: Logout uses window.confirm on web (Platform.OS check), Locations API with 8 seeded locations, Admin Locations screen with full CRUD and city filter, Map directions from car detail page, Admin stats includes total_locations. All previous features still working (auth, cars, bookings, admin panel).

auth.test_register_success: PASSED - User registration creates account with token
auth.test_login_success: PASSED - Admin login returns token and role

cars.test_get_all_cars_admin: PASSED - Admin can access all cars
cars.test_create_car_admin: PASSED - Admin can create car, verified with GET
cars.test_update_car_admin: PASSED - Admin can update car, verified with GET
cars.test_delete_car_admin: PASSED - Admin can delete car, verified with GET 404

bookings.test_create_booking_authenticated: PASSED - Authenticated user can create booking, verified with GET
bookings.test_get_bookings_authenticated: PASSED - User can retrieve their bookings

locations.test_get_locations_with_city_filter: PASSED - City filter works (2 Punta Cana locations)
locations.test_get_locations_cities_list: PASSED - Returns 4 cities: Miami, New York, Punta Cana, Santo Domingo
locations.test_create_location_admin: PASSED - Admin can create location, verified with GET
locations.test_update_location_admin: PASSED - Admin can update location, verified with GET
locations.test_delete_location_admin: PASSED - Admin can delete location, verified with GET 404

frontend_tests.logout_web: PASSED - Logout button shows window.confirm dialog on web with message 'Are you sure you want to logout?', successfully logs out and redirects to login page
frontend_tests.profile_screen: PASSED - Shows admin badge, email (admin@damscarrental.com), My Bookings link, Admin Panel link, Manage Locations link (admin only)
frontend_tests.admin_locations_screen: PASSED - Accessible from Profile -> Manage Locations, shows 8 locations with names, addresses, city/country tags, coordinates, edit/delete buttons
frontend_tests.admin_locations_filters: PASSED - City filter pills visible (All, Punta Cana, Santo Domingo, Miami, New York), clicking Punta Cana shows only 2 Punta Cana locations
frontend_tests.admin_locations_add: PASSED - Add location button opens modal with all fields (name, address, city, country, lat, lng, type), form submission works, new location appears in list
frontend_tests.admin_locations_crud: PASSED - Create, read, update, delete operations all working via UI
frontend_tests.car_detail_locations: PASSED - Car detail page shows Locations section with pickup and dropoff location buttons
frontend_tests.map_directions: PASSED - Car detail has pickup/dropoff location buttons, View Map & Directions link visible on booking page
frontend_tests.booking_flow: PASSED - Full booking flow works: car detail -> book now -> booking page with rental period, locations (View Map & Directions link), payment method selection (cash/stripe), confirm booking -> success page with booking details and total price
frontend_tests.home_screen: PASSED - Shows car cards with images, names, specs, prices (location info shown on detail page, not on cards)

new_features_tested.logout_fix: ✅ WORKING - Platform.OS === 'web' check implemented, uses window.confirm() on web instead of Alert.alert
new_features_tested.locations_api: ✅ WORKING - GET /api/locations returns 8 seeded locations (Punta Cana Airport, Bavaro Beach Hub, Santo Domingo Downtown, Las Americas Airport SDQ, Miami International Airport, Miami Beach Rental Center, JFK Airport New York, Manhattan Midtown Hub)
new_features_tested.admin_locations_screen: ✅ WORKING - Full CRUD interface with city filter, add/edit/delete buttons, location cards with all details
new_features_tested.city_filter: ✅ WORKING - Filter by city works correctly (tested with Punta Cana showing 2 locations)
new_features_tested.map_directions: ✅ WORKING - Car detail shows pickup/dropoff locations, booking page has 'View Map & Directions' link
new_features_tested.location_addresses: ✅ WORKING - Cars seeded with real addresses from Dominican Republic (Punta Cana, Santo Domingo) and USA (Miami, New York)
new_features_tested.admin_stats_locations: ✅ WORKING - Admin panel stats now includes total_locations count (8)
new_features_tested.admin_login: ✅ WORKING - admin@damscarrental.com / Admin@123 credentials work correctly
